item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 22min If you don't like sushi I genuinely don't trust you as a person. 6 27 1 mil
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 22min If you don't like sushi I genuinely don't trust you as a person. 6 27 1 mil

item.title: realjeffsimmons: Clevta reposteó Jeff Simmons @realjeffsimmons · 1h En respuesta a @Clevta Jalen milroe 24 overall! Man, I am a regular
item.description: Clevta reposteó Jeff Simmons @realjeffsimmons · 1h En respuesta a @Clevta Jalen milroe 24 overall! Man, I am a regular listener to mcshay and he’s very entertaining but every week he has a new point to contradict the week before. It’s madness 1 8 2 mil

item.title: RapSheet: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 34min #Bama WR Germie Bernard wrapped up his Top 30 visits with trips to the #Falcons today and
item.description: Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 34min #Bama WR Germie Bernard wrapped up his Top 30 visits with trips to the #Falcons today and #Steelers yesterday. The likely second rounder also visited with the #Browns and #Raiders, among others. 23 54 372 80 mil
